entity.summary: Netherlands-based bitcoin order-book exchange operated by Bitonic and launched in 2014. Bitonic closed BL3P trading on December 20, 2024 as part of a regulatory-driven consolidation into the Bitonic platform and transferred remaining balances to Bitonic accounts.
entity.notes: Launch is stored at year precision because Bitonic's current history states that BL3P launched in 2014, while a January 2014 announcement describes a private operating environment and staged public availability rather than one definitive public-launch day. The terminal exchange marker is 2024-12-20, when trading, deposits, and withdrawals stopped and balances migrated to Bitonic. The BL3P domain remains reachable only as a historical shutdown notice; live_verified does not imply active trading.

events.title: BL3P launched as Bitonic's bitcoin exchange
events.description: Bitonic launched BL3P in 2014 as a full order-book bitcoin trading platform alongside its existing buy-and-sell service.
events.notes: Year-level marker based on first-party history and a January 2014 launch-stage announcement.

events.title: Bitonic announced the closure of BL3P
events.description: Bitonic announced that BL3P would close on December 20, 2024, citing new regulation including MiCA and a decision to focus on the Bitonic platform.
events.notes: Trading, deposits, and withdrawals remained available until the announced terminal date.

events.title: BL3P trading shut down and balances migrated to Bitonic
events.description: BL3P ended trading, deposits, and withdrawals on December 20, 2024 and began transferring remaining user balances to Bitonic accounts.
events.notes: Used as the terminal exchange-service marker. Account history remained available temporarily after trading ended.

events.title: BL3P historical account portal was scheduled to go offline
events.description: After remaining available only for transaction-history access, the BL3P account website was scheduled for permanent removal on May 4, 2026.
events.notes: Post-shutdown archival-access milestone; it does not change the 2024-12-20 exchange death date.

evidence.title: Bitonic receives MiCAR license from Dutch AFM
evidence.notes: Bitonic's official history states that it launched the full BL3P trading platform in 2014.

evidence.title: Bitonic starts with Bitcoin exchange
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous first-party announcement describes BL3P as already operating privately and expanding access in early 2014.

evidence.title: BL3P shutting down by December 20th - Transition to Bitonic
evidence.notes: First-party closure notice gives the announcement date, terminal date, regulatory rationale, and balance-transfer plan.

evidence.title: Today marks the final day of BL3P - migration to Bitonic has started
evidence.notes: First-party final-day notice confirms migration of remaining balances and the end of BL3P trading operation.

evidence.title: Final notice: BL3P shutdown
evidence.notes: Retrospective first-party notice states that BL3P shut down on 2024-12-20 and transferred balances to Bitonic.

evidence.title: BL3P permanently offline
evidence.notes: First-party notice sets May 4, 2026 as the end of historical account and transaction-history access.

evidence.title: BL3P final shutdown notice
evidence.notes: Exchange-domain notice instructs users to export records before account-portal removal on May 4, 2026.
